zh.lifeSummary: 當John Belgrave於1320年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾時，他的父親Giles Lengingour30歲，母親Susanna Skipton38歲。他於1340年與Elizabeth De Shelton在英國爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1360年在英國萊希斯特斯爾貝爾格拉福享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Belgrave于1320年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾时，他的父亲Giles Lengingour30岁，母亲Susanna Skipton38岁。他于1340年与Elizabeth De Shelton在英国爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1360年在英国萊希斯特斯爾貝爾格拉福享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Belgrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Leicestershire, recorded in Domesday Book as Merdegrave. The original name derived from Old English mearth ‘marten’ + grāf ‘grove’, but after the Norman Conquest the first element was taken to be Old French merde ‘dung, filth’, and changed to Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’, to remove the unpleasant association. A mid 12th-century writer refers to the place as ‘Merthegrave, nunc (now) Belegrava’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Belgrave was born in 1320, in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Giles Lengingour, was 30 and his mother, Susanna Skipton, was 38. He married Elizabeth De Shelton in 1340, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1360, in Belgrave, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Belgrave est né en 1320, à Parkhall, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Giles Lengingour, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Susanna Skipton, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth De Shelton en 1340, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1360, à Belgrave, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Belgrave 1320 in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Giles Lengingour 30 und seine Mutter Susanna Skipton 38. Er hat 1340 in Cheshire, England Elizabeth De Shelton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1360 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Belgrave, Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Belgrave è nato il nel 1320 nel Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Giles Lengingour, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Susanna Skipton, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth De Shelton nel 1340, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1360, nel Belgrave, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Belgraveが1320年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアパークハルで生まれた時，父Giles Lengingourは30歳，母Susanna Skiptonは38歳であった。1340年にイギリスチェシュアイアでElizabeth De Sheltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1360年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルグラブで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Belgrave(이)가 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 박홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Giles Lengingour(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Susanna Skipton(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1340년 영국 체실르에서 Elizabeth De Shelton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1360년 영국 레이스스터실르 벨그레이브에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Belgrave nasceu em 1320, em Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Giles Lengingour, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Skipton, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth De Shelton em 1340, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1360, em Belgrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Belgrave родился в 1320 г. в местности пархолл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Giles Lengingour было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Susanna Skipton, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth De Shelton в 1340 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1360 г. в местности белграв, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Belgrave nació en 1320, en Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Giles Lengingour, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Susanna Skipton, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Elizabeth De Shelton en 1340, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1360, en Belgrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años.
